title: Facility Emergency Evacuation Plan
scenario: Develop a comprehensive facility emergency evacuation plan for a high-rise building, including procedures for evacuating employees, visitors, and guests in case of fire, earthquake, or other emergencies. The plan should address potential risks and vulnerabilities, as well as implementation and maintenance requirements. The target output should be a detailed, 10-page document with clear headings, concise paragraphs, and numbered lists.
constraints: Must include at least 10 different emergency evacuation scenarios
Must be written from the perspective of a facility manager

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated plan adheres to the specified constraints and format.
The plan covers all required emergency evacuation protocols for the high-rise building.
The plan is easy to understand and free of unnecessary information.
The plan is properly formatted and structured using a standard emergency evacuation plan template.
